arts.ttl: Juventus Target Renato Veiga as Giuntoli Seeks Last Minute Defensive Reinforcements
arts.sum: Juventus are scouting the Premier League market to bolster their defensive lineup, with Sporting Director Cristiano Giuntoli aiming to secure at least one, if not two, new defenders. This move comes in response to Bremer's injury and the imminent departure of Danilo, who is expected to terminate his contract and join Napoli. arts.ttl: Tomori Reaffirms Commitment to Milan Despite Juventus Interest
arts.sum: In a recent development in the Italian transfer market, AC Milan defender Fikayo Tomori has reportedly reaffirmed his commitment to the Rossoneri, despite interest from Juventus. This news comes after a phone conversation between Tomori and Juventus manager Thiago Motta, which took place in the last few hours.
